description: Bundled reproduction targets shipped in-repo so they are available + selectable on a fresh clone with no network fetch. Resolved by backend/services/ingestion/paper_registry.py and surfaced as CLI aliases + the GET /papers preset list. PDFs are rendered from each paper's parsed full text (text-only — the reproduction pipeline is text-based).

papers.title: Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.note: The future-dated arXiv id does not fetch from arxiv.org; bundling is what makes SDAR reproducible offline (this is the gap that produced degraded 469-char runs).

papers.title: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization
Striving for Simplicity: The All Convolutional Net
OmniZip: Audio-Guided Dynamic Token Compression for Fast Omnimodal Large Language Models
papers.note: Omnimodal (audio+video) — uses Qwen2.5-Omni-7B; a cell may need >1 GPU (set REPROLAB_FORCE_SINGLE_GPU=false).
